import json,sys
data=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if isinstance\(data, list\):
    pngs=[f for f in data if f['name'].endswith\('.png'\)]
    others=[f for f in data if not f['name'].endswith\('.png'\)]
    print\(f'PNG files: {len\(pngs\)}, Other: {len\(others\)}'\)
    for f in data[:15]:
        print\(f'  {f[\\"type\\"]:5s}  {f[\\"name\\"]}  \({f[\\"size\\"]} bytes\)'\)
    if len\(data\) > 15:
        print\(f'  ... and {len\(data\)-15} more'\)
else:
    print\(json.dumps\(data, indent=2\)[:1000]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/c/Users/Jorge Sierra/bar-chart-race" && python -c "
from bar_race.config import Config
from bar_race.render import FrameRenderer, _load_headshot
from bar_race.themes import get_theme
from bar_race.ingest import load
from bar_race.normalize import normalize
from bar_race.animate import build_keyframes, interpolate_frames

cfg = Config\(input_path='sample_data/nba_points_2024_long.xlsx',
             headshot_dir='assets/headshots', theme='midnight-premium',
             preset='youtube', top_n=10, duration_sec=10, fps=30\)

df = load\(cfg\)
ndf = normalize\(df, cfg\)
kfs = build_keyframes\(ndf, cfg.top_n\)
frames = interpolate_frames\(kfs[0], kfs[1], fps=30, seg_duration=1.0\)
state = frames[0]

print\('Bars in first frame:'\)
for bar in state.bars:
    print\(f'  player={bar.player!r} team={bar.team!r} rank={bar.rank} value={bar.value}'\)

print\(\)
print\(f'headshot_dir: {cfg.headshot_dir!r}'\)
renderer = FrameRenderer\(cfg\)
th = renderer.theme

from pathlib import Path
for bar in state.bars:
    hs = _load_headshot\(bar.player, cfg.headshot_dir, 60, th\)
    p = Path\(cfg.headshot_dir\) / f'{bar.player}.png'
    print\(f'  {bar.player}: file_exists={p.is_file\(\)}, loaded={hs is not None}'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/c/Users/Jorge Sierra/bar-chart-race" && python -c "
from bar_race.render import _load_headshot
from bar_race.themes import get_theme
from pathlib import Path

th = get_theme\('midnight-premium'\)
players = ['Shai Gilgeous-Alexander', 'Luka Doncic', 'LeBron James', 'Kevin Durant',
           'Jayson Tatum', 'Giannis Antetokounmpo', 'Anthony Edwards', 'Nikola Jokic']

for p in players:
    hs = _load_headshot\(p, 'assets/headshots', 60, th\)
    exists = Path\(f'assets/headshots/{p}.png'\).is_file\(\)
    print\(f'{p}: file_exists={exists}, loaded={hs is not None}'\)

# Now render a single frame to an image and save it
from bar_race.config import Config
from bar_race.render import FrameRenderer
from bar_race.animate import BarState, FrameState

cfg = Config\(input_path='sample_data/nba_points_2024_long.xlsx',
             headshot_dir='assets/headshots', theme='midnight-premium',
             preset='youtube', top_n=5\)
renderer = FrameRenderer\(cfg\)

bars = [
    BarState\('LeBron James', 'LAL', 1500, 0, 1.0, False, False\),
    BarState\('Kevin Durant', 'PHX', 1400, 1, 1.0, False, False\),
    BarState\('Luka Doncic', 'DAL', 1300, 2, 1.0, False, False\),
    BarState\('Jayson Tatum', 'BOS', 1200, 3, 1.0, False, False\),
    BarState\('Nikola Jokic', 'DEN', 1100, 4, 1.0, False, False\),
]
state = FrameState\(bars=bars, max_value=1500, date_label='Jan 15, 2024'\)
img = renderer.render\(state\)
img.save\('debug_frame.png'\)
print\('Saved debug_frame.png'\)
print\(f'Image size: {img.size}'\)
" 2>&1)

from bar_race.render import FrameRenderer
from bar_race.animate import BarState, FrameState

cfg = Config\(input_path='sample_data/nba_points_2024_long.xlsx',

    BarState\('Jayson Tatum', 'BOS', 1200, 3, 1.0, False, False\),
    BarState\('Nikola Jokic', 'DEN', 1100, 4, 1.0, False, False\),
]

Bash(cd "/c/Users/Jorge Sierra/bar-chart-race" && python -c "
from bar_race.config import Config
from bar_race.render import FrameRenderer
from bar_race.animate import BarState, FrameState

cfg = Config\(input_path='x', headshot_dir='assets/headshots', theme='midnight-premium',
             preset='youtube', top_n=5\)
renderer = FrameRenderer\(cfg\)

bars = [
    BarState\('LeBron James', 'LAL', 1500, 0, 1.0, False, False\),
    BarState\('Kevin Durant', 'PHX', 1400, 1, 1.0, False, False\),
    BarState\('Luka Doncic', 'DAL', 1300, 2, 1.0, False, False\),
]
state = FrameState\(bars=bars, date_label='Jan 15, 2024', progress=0.5, max_value=1500\)

# Trace rendering
print\(f'n_bars={cfg.top_n}'\)
print\(f'W={renderer.W}, H={renderer.H}'\)
print\(f'margin_left={renderer._margin_left}, margin_right={renderer._margin_right}'\)
print\(f'bar_area_top={renderer._bar_area_top}, bar_area_bottom={renderer._bar_area_bottom}'\)
bar_area_h = renderer._bar_area_bottom - renderer._bar_area_top
print\(f'bar_area_h={bar_area_h}'\)
bar_gap = max\(4, int\(bar_area_h * 0.02\)\)
bar_h = max\(8, \(bar_area_h - bar_gap * \(cfg.top_n + 1\)\) // cfg.top_n\)
max_bar_w = renderer.W - renderer._margin_left - renderer._margin_right
print\(f'bar_gap={bar_gap}, bar_h={bar_h}, max_bar_w={max_bar_w}'\)

for bar in bars:
    y_center = renderer._bar_area_top + bar_gap + bar.rank * \(bar_h + bar_gap\) + bar_h / 2
    y1 = int\(y_center - bar_h / 2\)
    y2 = int\(y_center + bar_h / 2\)
    bar_w = int\(\(bar.value / max\(state.max_value, 1e-9\)\) * max_bar_w\)
    x1 = renderer._margin_left
    x2 = x1 + bar_w
    print\(f'  {bar.player}: rank={bar.rank}, y1={y1}, y2={y2}, x1={x1}, x2={x2}, bar_w={bar_w}'\)
    print\(f'    skip? rank\({bar.rank}\) >= n_bars\({cfg.top_n}\) = {bar.rank >= cfg.top_n}'\)
" 2>&1)

from bar_race.render import FrameRenderer
from bar_race.animate import BarState, FrameState

             preset='youtube', top_n=5\)

# Correct field order: player, value, rank, team, entering, exiting, alpha
bars = [
    BarState\(player='LeBron James', value=1500, rank=0, team='LAL'\),
    BarState\(player='Kevin Durant', value=1400, rank=1, team='PHX'\),
    BarState\(player='Luka Doncic', value=1300, rank=2, team='DAL'\),

    BarState\(player='Nikola Jokic', value=1100, rank=4, team='DEN'\),
]
state = FrameState\(bars=bars, date_label='Jan 15, 2024', progress=0.5, max_value=1500\)
img = renderer.render\(state\)
img.save\('debug_frame.png'\)
print\(f'Saved debug_frame.png'\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "/c/Users/Jorge Sierra/bar-chart-race" && python -c "
from bar_race.config import Config
from bar_race.render import FrameRenderer, _headshot_cache
from bar_race.animate import BarState, FrameState

bars = [
    BarState\(player='Shai Gilgeous-Alexander', value=1500, rank=0, team='OKC'\),
    BarState\(player='Luka Doncic', value=1400, rank=1, team='DAL'\),
    BarState\(player='Giannis Antetokounmpo', value=1300, rank=2, team='MIL'\),
    BarState\(player='Jayson Tatum', value=1200, rank=3, team='BOS'\),
    BarState\(player='Kevin Durant', value=1100, rank=4, team='PHX'\),
    BarState\(player='LeBron James', value=1050, rank=5, team='LAL'\),
    BarState\(player='Anthony Edwards', value=1000, rank=6, team='MIN'\),
    BarState\(player='Nikola Jokic', value=950, rank=7, team='DEN'\),
    BarState\(player='Devin Booker', value=900, rank=8, team='PHX'\),
    BarState\(player='Trae Young', value=850, rank=9, team='ATL'\),
]
state = FrameState\(bars=bars, date_label='Jan 15, 2024', progress=0.5, max_value=1500\)

themes = ['espn-broadcast', 'fantasy-leaderboard', 'the-ringer', 'neon-court', 'hoopshype-dark']
for slug in themes:
    _headshot_cache.clear\(\)
    cfg = Config\(input_path='x', headshot_dir='assets/headshots', theme=slug,
                 preset='youtube', top_n=10, title='NBA Scoring Leaders', subtitle='2024-25 Season'\)
    renderer = FrameRenderer\(cfg\)
    img = renderer.render\(state\)
    img.save\(f'debug_{slug}.png'\)
    print\(f'Saved debug_{slug}.png \({img.size}\)'\)
" 2>&1)

import urllib.request
from PIL import Image
from io import BytesIO

players = {
    'Oscar Robertson': 76001,
    'Wilt Chamberlain': 76066,
}

for name, pid in players.items\(\):
    url = f'https://cdn.nba.com/headshots/nba/latest/1040x760/{pid}.png'
    out = f'assets/headshots/{name}.png'
    print\(f'Downloading {name} \(ID {pid}\)...'\)
    try:
        urllib.request.urlretrieve\(url, out\)
        img = Image.open\(out\)
        print\(f'  OK: {img.size} {img.mode}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'  FAILED: {e}'\)
")

from PIL import Image

# Convert to RGBA and resize to 256x256 to match other headshots
for name in ['Oscar Robertson', 'Wilt Chamberlain']:
    path = f'assets/headshots/{name}.png'
    img = Image.open\(path\).convert\('RGBA'\)
    # Crop to square \(center crop the wider dimension\)
    w, h = img.size
    s = min\(w, h\)
    left = \(w - s\) // 2
    top = \(h - s\) // 2
    img = img.crop\(\(left, top, left + s, top + s\)\)
    img = img.resize\(\(256, 256\), Image.LANCZOS\)
    img.save\(path\)
    print\(f'{name}: saved {img.size} RGBA'\)
")
